title: Fislan
content:

{{Quote|I have submitted this SecuriDex particularly for Cene because of her unpredictable style: her amazing abilities very nearly cost me one of my newest soldiers during training movements on Fislan.|Bren Derlin, in a Rebel Task Force on Alliance Security SecuriDex file on Cene Gilvent|<ref name="AIR" />}}
'''Fislan''' was a terrestrial celestial body<ref name="AIR" /> situated in the [[Fislan system/Legends|Fislan system]], a part of the [[Mortex sector/Legends|Mortex sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[Trans-Hydian/Legends|Trans-Hydian]] portion of<ref name="TransHydian" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> At some point by [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]],<ref name="Date">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'' represents a collection of [[in-universe]] reports from "one [[Standard year/Legends|year]] before the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]," which corresponds to [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] force carried out training movements on Fislan, at which time the [[Ocsin]] [[swordmaster]] [[Cene Gilvent]], a member of the [[Zulirian Swordmasters]] group of [[Melee weapon/Legends|melee weapon]] afficionados, attacked and nearly [[Death/Legends|killed]] one of the Rebel [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]]. Alliance [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Bren Derlin/Legends|Bren Derlin]] subsequently mentioned the encounter in a [[Task Force on Alliance Security]] [[SecuriDex]] [[Datafile/Legends|datafile]] on Gilvent.<ref name="AIR" />

==Behind the scenes==
Fislan was mentioned in ''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'', a [[1995]] sourcebook for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="AIR" /> The [[StarWars.com]] [[Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion|Online Companion]] to the [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' subsequently placed the Fislan [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the celestial body itself, in grid square R-4.<ref name="EAOC" />
